function solve(landStartTime: number[], landDuration: number[], waterStartTime: number[], waterDuration: number[]): number {
    let minTime = Infinity;
    for (let i = 0; i < landStartTime.length; i++) {
        for (let j = 0; j < waterStartTime.length; j++) {
            // Land first then water
            const landEnd = landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i];
            const waterStart = Math.max(landEnd, waterStartTime[j]);
            const waterEnd = waterStart + waterDuration[j];
            minTime = Math.min(minTime, waterEnd);
            
            // Water first then land
            const waterEndFirst = waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j];
            const landStart = Math.max(waterEndFirst, landStartTime[i]);
            const landEndFirst = landStart + landDuration[i];
            minTime = Math.min(minTime, landEndFirst);
        }
    }
    return minTime;
}
